- Redemption API active
- Split fee payload validation active
- split_fee value > total sale amount

- Gift card code: Valid code with £100 balance
- Redemption amount (sale total): £50.00
- split_fee: [{type_id: 3, value_type: "amount", value: 60.00}] (£60 > £50 sale)
- Test 2: split_fee: [{type_id: 3, value_type: "amount", value: 50.01}] (just over sale)
- Test 3: split_fee: [{type_id: 3, value_type: "amount", value: 50.00}] (equal to sale - edge case)
Test steps:
1. Initiate gift card redemption with sale amount £50.00
2. Pass split_fee with value: 60.00 (exceeds sale amount)
3. Verify sale fails with API error
